meaning: adj.无胆量的,没勇气的,没有生气的
examples: By attacking me, by attacking my wife, he has proved himself to be a gutless coward.
Gutless years? How come I have never seen you?
And if they continue to play in this gutless and guileless fashion relegation is a very real possibility.
General secretary Simon Block said Mr Oyebola was "one of nature's gentlemen" and the shooting was a "cowardly and gutless attack".
